title: Looking for a fan made cut of End of Eva
display_title: Looking for a fan made cut of End of Eva
wikitext:
[]: Looking for a fan-made cut of End of Eva             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Jan 06, 2020 5:56 pm I can't recall if I read it around here or where or if it was a fever dream or some conversation I had... It's supposedly a fan-made cut of EoE that splices scenes from the EoTV mental breakdowns into the 3rd impact scenes, thus, making both endings more or less complementary/simultaneous... Does it exist or should I ask my shrink for a higher dose?

[]: Re: Looking for a fan-made cut of End of Eva             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Jan 06, 2020 9:28 pm I can very well see such a cut existing, but I haven't come across it yet - not that I looked for it, so that on its own isn't saying an awful lot

[]: Re: Looking for a fan-made cut of End of Eva             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Jan 07, 2020 6:37 am You could try going to your favourite site for acquiring fanmade videos and search for "evangelion concurrency". It's not for me to say what you might find, of course. There's also this thread , and others.

[]: Re: Looking for a fan-made cut of End of Eva             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 07, 2020 5:12 pm Myself and some other folks put that together back in the day, yep! Paul's link should help you

[]: Re: Looking for a fan-made cut of End of Eva             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Tue Jan 07, 2020 6:08 pm Holy shit I knew it! (still asking for a new dose, though) Thanks! I'll begin downloading right away... I was organizing my Eva video library and recalled that one... Once I finish ripping the Reiquarium cut of Ep. 23 it will all be complete!
